languages.text: "Я мог{mf||ла} бы тебя уничтожить, но мое предложение союза все еще в силе".
"I could have destroyed you, but my offer of an alliance still stands."
languages.original_text: "Я мог{mf||ла} бы тебя уничтожить, но мое предложение союза все еще в силе".

traits.locale_text: "I could have destroyed you, but my offer of an alliance still stands."
"I could have destroyed you, but my offer of an alliance still stands."
"I could have destroyed you, but my offer of an alliance still stands."

languages.text: «Podría haberla destruido, pero mi oferta de alianza sigue en pie».
languages.original_text: "I could have destroyed you, but my offer of an alliance still stands."

traits.locale_text: «Podría haberla destruido, pero mi oferta de alianza sigue en pie».

languages.text: “我本可以杀了你，但我的合作提议仍然有效。”
languages.original_text: "I could have destroyed you, but my offer of an alliance still stands."

traits.locale_text: “我本可以杀了你，但我的合作提议仍然有效。”

languages.text: « J'aurais pu vous anéantir, mais mon offre d'alliance tient toujours. »
languages.original_text: "I could have destroyed you, but my offer of an alliance still stands."

traits.locale_text: « J'aurais pu vous anéantir, mais mon offre d'alliance tient toujours. »

languages.text: "Seni yok edebilirdim ama müttefiklik teklifim hâlâ geçerli."
languages.original_text: "I could have destroyed you, but my offer of an alliance still stands."

traits.locale_text: "Seni yok edebilirdim ama müttefiklik teklifim hâlâ geçerli."

languages.text: "Ich hätte Euch töten können, biete Euch aber noch immer eine Allianz an."
languages.original_text: "I could have destroyed you, but my offer of an alliance still stands."

traits.locale_text: "Ich hätte Euch töten können, biete Euch aber noch immer eine Allianz an."

languages.text: 「君を滅ぼすこともできたが、同盟の申し出は今も有効だ」
languages.original_text: "I could have destroyed you, but my offer of an alliance still stands."

traits.locale_text: 「君を滅ぼすこともできたが、同盟の申し出は今も有効だ」
